TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai piheratengay a lihay == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai mapatay i 6/15 piheratengay a lihay, congtong ci Lay Cingte citodong pipadongosan a kacingangan no kakeridan. 2024/06/05 13:41 (Singpon paratohay ci Hong roycin/Taynan ratoh ) Da'oc no 'orip mikinafalahay to saki nikapolongan no taywan a onto ci Huang Zhaokai o Kokomindayhiw ci Huang Zhaokai itini i 6/1 miliyas to hekal mapatay, kasa rekad no tamdaw ma'ilol to saki Taywan nikapolongan a ci mikinafalahay, mapapolong patireng to padongosay a wiyinhuy, nai congtong ci Lay Cingte citodongay malakakeridan, Taynansi siciw ci Huang Weizhe ci todong to midemakay kakeridan, mapolong midama to sakipadongos a demak. Saka pipadongios maketong i 6/9 midemak to mipatelian ato pitodohan, itiya o no Mincintang a fayfay ko sapi tahepo, roma romi'ad 6/15 midemak to pihiratengan a lihay, saka nga'ay no icowacowaay mapolong mihirateng ato padongos to nian pali'ayaway to saki Taywan nikapolongan a tamdaw. Ci Huang Zhaokai masofoc i 1942 mihecaan, o Taynansi a tamdaw, nano saka 2, 3 rekad a komindayhiw, 'ayaw mikihatiyaay to papotalay no tang ko demak, nai papotalay tang a piliyang, mincintang patireng tangasa Taywan nikapolongan syakay, mida'oc ko 'orip to saki kasa nikapolongan caay ka ci awaayay ningra mikihatiya. Ramasato, ci Huang Zhaokai nai 1980 mihecaan miteka misa'icel midipot to mafadesay i Militaw laloma'an, mipa'ayaw palowad to 228 demak a payakyak, itiya cingra i 1995 miheca patireng to katimolay radio dingtay, i katedalan katimolay sa'etal tadamaanay nikapolongan a piparatohan. Pasowal sa ko citodongay padongos kakeridan ci Huang Weizhe, nengnengen ko 'orip ni Huang Zhaokai, ano itira to i lalan, itira to i kasa'opan no kitakit ano eca i radio a kamok, oyaan to ko faloco' ningra to saki nikapolongan ko pisingting ko ni niyah a harateng, nai sa'ayaw tangasa anini caay ka falic, o sasowalen itini i rarakaten no Taywan ti saki nikapolongan o tadamaanay micikerohay ato palowaday a tamdaw, saki nian o tata'ongen cingra, nanay mapakahinom ko laloma'an ato citodongay padamaay, saka da'ocay to saki Taywan nikapolongan a misa'icelay ci Huang Zhaokai masawad to ningra ko karorayan a hakal minokay to i kakarayan, rihaday i ci Wamaan. Midotoc to pihalaka no citodongay a wiyinhuy, o pipatelian i takenip ci Huang Zhaokai itira i 6/9 herek no lahok 1:30 ko toki i Nanpin huayti cahong mihemak, paherek padongos i Taynansi pitodojan, ikor o mamida'oc mapateli i Taynansi Keristokiw tadem; roma i 6/15 itira i Taynansi "Hungyin wencuang ciwsing" midemak pihiratengan a lihay.
S.PHON: == nikapo~uɾo~uŋan taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai piħəratəŋaj a ɾiħaj == nikapo~uɾo~uŋan taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai mapataj i */** piħəratəŋaj a ɾiħaj, ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ɾaj ʦiŋtə ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~usan a kaʦiŋaŋan no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan. ****/**/** **:** (siŋpo~un parato~uħaj ʦi ħo~uŋ ro~ujʦin/tajnan rato~uħ ) ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip mikinafaɾaħaj to~u saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan a o~unto~u ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai o~u ko~uko~uminɬ~ɮajħiw ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai itini i */* miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ mapataj, kasa rəkaɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw maʡiɾo~uɾ to~u saki tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ʦi mikinafaɾaħaj, mapapo~uɾo~uŋ patirəŋ to~u paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~usaj a wijinħo~u~uj, nai ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ɾaj ʦiŋtə ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan, tajnansi siʦiw ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ wəi*ħə ʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj kakəriɬ~ɮan, mapo~uɾo~uŋ miɬ~ɮama to~u sakipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka pipaɬ~ɮo~uŋio~us makəto~uŋ i */* miɬ~ɮəmak to~u mipatəɾian ato~u pito~uɬ~ɮo~uħan, itija o~u no~u minʦintaŋ a fajfaj ko~u sapi taħəpo~u, ro~uma ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ */** miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħiratəŋan a ɾiħaj, saka ŋaʡaj no~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj mapo~uɾo~uŋ miħiratəŋ ato~u paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us to~u nian paɾiʡajawaj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw. ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai maso~ufo~uʦ i **** miħəʦaan, o~u tajnansi a tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~u saka *, * rəkaɬ~ɮ a ko~uminɬ~ɮajħiw, ʡajaw mikiħatijaaj to~u papo~utaɾaj no~u taŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, nai papo~utaɾaj taŋ a piɾijaŋ, minʦintaŋ patirəŋ taŋasa tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan sjakaj, miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u ʡo~urip to~u saki kasa nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ʦaaj ka ʦi awaajaj niŋra mikiħatija. ramasato~u, ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai nai **** miħəʦaan mitəka misaʡiʦəɾ miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u mafaɬ~ɮəsaj i miɾitaw ɾaɾo~umaʡan, mipaʡajaw paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u *** ɬ~ɮəmak a pajakjak, itija ʦiŋra i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u katimo~uɾaj raɬ~ɮio~u ɬ~ɮiŋtaj, i katəɬ~ɮaɾan katimo~uɾaj saʡətaɾ taɬ~ɮamaanaj nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a piparato~uħan. paso~uwaɾ sa ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ wəi*ħə, nəŋnəŋən ko~u ʡo~urip ni ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, ano~u itira to~u i ɾaɾan, itira to~u i kasaʡo~upan no~u kitakit ano~u əʦa i raɬ~ɮio~u a kamo~uk, o~ujaan to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra to~u saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u pisiŋtiŋ ko~u ni nijaħ a ħaratəŋ, nai saʡajaw taŋasa anini ʦaaj ka faɾiʦ, o~u saso~uwaɾən itini i rarakatən no~u tajwan ti saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj miʦikəro~uħaj ato~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, saki nian o~u tataʡo~uŋən ʦiŋra, nanaj mapakaħino~um ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paɬ~ɮamaaj, saka ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a misaʡiʦəɾaj ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai masawaɬ~ɮ to~u niŋra ko~u karo~urajan a ħakaɾ mino~ukaj to~u i kakarajan, riħaɬ~ɮaj i ʦi wamaan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u piħaɾaka no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a wijinħo~u~uj, o~u pipatəɾian i takənip ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai itira i */* ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk *:** ko~u to~uki i nanpin ħo~u~uajti ʦaħo~uŋ miħəmak, paħərək paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us i tajnansi pito~uɬ~ɮo~ujan, iko~ur o~u mamiɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ mapatəɾi i tajnansi kəristo~ukiw taɬ~ɮəm; ro~uma i */** itira i tajnansi "ħo~u~uŋjin wənʦo~u~uaŋ ʦiwsiŋ" miɬ~ɮəmak piħiratəŋan a ɾiħaj.
S.FORM: == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai piheratengay a lihay == Nikapolongan tadamaanay ci Huang Zhaokai mapatay i 6/15 piheratengay a lihay, congtong ci Lay Cingte citodong pipadongosan a kacingangan no kakeridan. 2024/06/05 13:41 (Singpon paratohay ci Hong roycin/Taynan ratoh ) Da'oc no 'orip mikinafalahay to saki nikapolongan no taywan a onto ci Huang Zhaokai o Kokomindayhiw ci Huang Zhaokai itini i 6/1 miliyas to hekal mapatay, kasa rekad no tamdaw ma'ilol to saki Taywan nikapolongan a ci mikinafalahay, mapapolong patireng to padongosay a wiyinhuy, nai congtong ci Lay Cingte citodongay malakakeridan, Taynansi siciw ci Huang Weizhe ci todong to midemakay kakeridan, mapolong midama to sakipadongos a demak. Saka pipadongios maketong i 6/9 midemak to mipatelian ato pitodohan, itiya o no Mincintang a fayfay ko sapi tahepo, roma romi'ad 6/15 midemak to pihiratengan a lihay, saka nga'ay no icowacowaay mapolong mihirateng ato padongos to nian pali'ayaway to saki Taywan nikapolongan a tamdaw. Ci Huang Zhaokai masofoc i 1942 mihecaan, o Taynansi a tamdaw, nano saka 2, 3 rekad a komindayhiw, 'ayaw mikihatiyaay to papotalay no tang ko demak, nai papotalay tang a piliyang, mincintang patireng tangasa Taywan nikapolongan syakay, mida'oc ko 'orip to saki kasa nikapolongan caay ka ci awaayay ningra mikihatiya. Ramasato, ci Huang Zhaokai nai 1980 mihecaan miteka misa'icel midipot to mafadesay i Militaw laloma'an, mipa'ayaw palowad to 228 demak a payakyak, itiya cingra i 1995 miheca patireng to katimolay radio dingtay, i katedalan katimolay sa'etal tadamaanay nikapolongan a piparatohan. Pasowal sa ko citodongay padongos kakeridan ci Huang Weizhe, nengnengen ko 'orip ni Huang Zhaokai, ano itira to i lalan, itira to i kasa'opan no kitakit ano eca i radio a kamok, oyaan to ko faloco' ningra to saki nikapolongan ko pisingting ko ni niyah a harateng, nai sa'ayaw tangasa anini caay ka falic, o sasowalen itini i rarakaten no Taywan ti saki nikapolongan o tadamaanay micikerohay ato palowaday a tamdaw, saki nian o tata'ongen cingra, nanay mapakahinom ko laloma'an ato citodongay padamaay, saka da'ocay to saki Taywan nikapolongan a misa'icelay ci Huang Zhaokai masawad to ningra ko karorayan a hakal minokay to i kakarayan, rihaday i ci Wamaan. Midotoc to pihalaka no citodongay a wiyinhuy, o pipatelian i takenip ci Huang Zhaokai itira i 6/9 herek no lahok 1:30 ko toki i Nanpin huayti cahong mihemak, paherek padongos i Taynansi pitodojan, ikor o mamida'oc mapateli i Taynansi Keristokiw tadem; roma i 6/15 itira i Taynansi "Hungyin wencuang ciwsing" midemak pihiratengan a lihay.
S.PHON: == nikapo~uɾo~uŋan taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai piħəratəŋaj a ɾiħaj == nikapo~uɾo~uŋan taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai mapataj i */** piħəratəŋaj a ɾiħaj, ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ɾaj ʦiŋtə ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~usan a kaʦiŋaŋan no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan. ****/**/** **:** (siŋpo~un parato~uħaj ʦi ħo~uŋ ro~ujʦin/tajnan rato~uħ ) ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u ʡo~urip mikinafaɾaħaj to~u saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan a o~unto~u ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai o~u ko~uko~uminɬ~ɮajħiw ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai itini i */* miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ mapataj, kasa rəkaɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw maʡiɾo~uɾ to~u saki tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ʦi mikinafaɾaħaj, mapapo~uɾo~uŋ patirəŋ to~u paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~usaj a wijinħo~u~uj, nai ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ɾaj ʦiŋtə ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan, tajnansi siʦiw ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ wəi*ħə ʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj kakəriɬ~ɮan, mapo~uɾo~uŋ miɬ~ɮama to~u sakipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka pipaɬ~ɮo~uŋio~us makəto~uŋ i */* miɬ~ɮəmak to~u mipatəɾian ato~u pito~uɬ~ɮo~uħan, itija o~u no~u minʦintaŋ a fajfaj ko~u sapi taħəpo~u, ro~uma ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ */** miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħiratəŋan a ɾiħaj, saka ŋaʡaj no~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj mapo~uɾo~uŋ miħiratəŋ ato~u paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us to~u nian paɾiʡajawaj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw. ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai maso~ufo~uʦ i **** miħəʦaan, o~u tajnansi a tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~u saka *, * rəkaɬ~ɮ a ko~uminɬ~ɮajħiw, ʡajaw mikiħatijaaj to~u papo~utaɾaj no~u taŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, nai papo~utaɾaj taŋ a piɾijaŋ, minʦintaŋ patirəŋ taŋasa tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan sjakaj, miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u ʡo~urip to~u saki kasa nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ʦaaj ka ʦi awaajaj niŋra mikiħatija. ramasato~u, ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai nai **** miħəʦaan mitəka misaʡiʦəɾ miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u mafaɬ~ɮəsaj i miɾitaw ɾaɾo~umaʡan, mipaʡajaw paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u *** ɬ~ɮəmak a pajakjak, itija ʦiŋra i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u katimo~uɾaj raɬ~ɮio~u ɬ~ɮiŋtaj, i katəɬ~ɮaɾan katimo~uɾaj saʡətaɾ taɬ~ɮamaanaj nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a piparato~uħan. paso~uwaɾ sa ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ wəi*ħə, nəŋnəŋən ko~u ʡo~urip ni ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, ano~u itira to~u i ɾaɾan, itira to~u i kasaʡo~upan no~u kitakit ano~u əʦa i raɬ~ɮio~u a kamo~uk, o~ujaan to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra to~u saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u pisiŋtiŋ ko~u ni nijaħ a ħaratəŋ, nai saʡajaw taŋasa anini ʦaaj ka faɾiʦ, o~u saso~uwaɾən itini i rarakatən no~u tajwan ti saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj miʦikəro~uħaj ato~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, saki nian o~u tataʡo~uŋən ʦiŋra, nanaj mapakaħino~um ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paɬ~ɮamaaj, saka ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj to~u saki tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a misaʡiʦəɾaj ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai masawaɬ~ɮ to~u niŋra ko~u karo~urajan a ħakaɾ mino~ukaj to~u i kakarajan, riħaɬ~ɮaj i ʦi wamaan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u piħaɾaka no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a wijinħo~u~uj, o~u pipatəɾian i takənip ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai itira i */* ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk *:** ko~u to~uki i nanpin ħo~u~uajti ʦaħo~uŋ miħəmak, paħərək paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us i tajnansi pito~uɬ~ɮo~ujan, iko~ur o~u mamiɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ mapatəɾi i tajnansi kəristo~ukiw taɬ~ɮəm; ro~uma i */** itira i tajnansi "ħo~u~uŋjin wənʦo~u~uaŋ ʦiwsiŋ" miɬ~ɮəmak piħiratəŋan a ɾiħaj.
